main_hypothesis.justification: Anchor 'improper installation Vessel 5 + damaged/missing interconnector + missing brine seal first element + feed-to-conc[entrate bypass]' literal — captura ambas hipótesis (Semi-closed).

alternatives.justification: 3 alts brief (telescoping, defect, sole missing brine seal).

recommended_action.justification: Isolate + depressurize + unload all 12 + inspect interconnector O-rings + install brine seal correctly — match gold.

requested_data.justification: Pide conductivity profile along central permeate tube probe — match accepted.

decision_change_condition.justification: Multi: gradual uniform increase vs sharp step-change → switch.
